summary: Iteration 260: All 4 critical bug fixes verified working. (1) Google Auth callback properly extracts session_id and shows error with 'detail' field, (2) Photo to Comic diagnostic shows LLM available=true, (3) Admin user on Reel Generator sees NO upgrade banners (creditsLoaded state working), (4) Gallery page shows 48 showcase videos with HD thumbnails and remix leaderboard.

minor.issue: Shows 999999 instead of 999999999 for admin (display cap, not actual issue)

BUG_FIX_1_GOOGLE_AUTH.test_result: POST /api/auth/google-callback returns proper error with 'detail' field
BUG_FIX_1_GOOGLE_AUTH.console_log: Auth callback error: {detail: Invalid session or session expired}
BUG_FIX_1_GOOGLE_AUTH.behavior: User redirected to /login with toast error message

BUG_FIX_3_REEL_GENERATOR_BANNERS.creditsLoaded_state: Working - banners only render after credits load

BUG_FIX_4_GALLERY_SHOWCASE.thumbnails: All videos have HD thumbnails from static.prod-images.emergentagent.com
BUG_FIX_4_GALLERY_SHOWCASE.gallery_seed_log: Gallery already has 12 showcase items (from backend startup)

BUG_FIX_4b_GALLERY_SEEDING.backend_log: 2026-03-15 07:49:18,239 - creatorstudio - INFO - Gallery already has 12 showcase items
BUG_FIX_4b_GALLERY_SEEDING.note: Startup seeding is working, but gallery shows 48 items (12 showcase + 36 user created)

seed_data_creation: None - existing showcase data verified working
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 4 bug fixes verified working. (1) AuthCallback.js extracts session_id from URL hash and shows backend 'detail' errors. (2) Photo to Comic LLM is available and configured. (3) ReelGenerator creditsLoaded state prevents upgrade banners from flashing - admin with 999999999 credits sees no banners. (4) Gallery has 48 videos with HD thumbnails from seed_gallery.py showcase items + user creations. Backend auto-seeds on startup when no showcase items exist.
